title: Bigger Ender Chests
description: This mod doubles the size of the ender chest, increasing it from 3 to 6 rows.
body:
Bigger Ender Chests increases the size of the ender chest from 3 rows to 6 rows.

Installed on client it works for single-player worlds, if installed on server it works for all players without installing it on the client.

![Player interacting with 6-row ender chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2ea0c2e8eb3b6a5b8b546d088ee5a17925a029a_0.webp)

⚠️ KEEP IN MIND: Removing the mod will result in the ender chest reverting back to 3 rows and all items on the bottom 3 rows will be lost.
